records.m_Talk_ENG: They're coming! It's a large monster this time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're coming! It's a large monster this time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're coming! It's a large monster this time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's charging toward the residential area! The evacuated villagers are in there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's charging toward the residential area! The evacuated villagers are in there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's charging toward the residential area! The evacuated villagers are in there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! Why won't it stop even after I've already hit it this much?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! Why won't it stop even after I've already hit it this much?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! Why won't it stop even after I've already hit it this much?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll stop it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll stop it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll stop it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Wait...! You're not thinking of blocking it with your body
8g?!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Wait...! You're not thinking of blocking it with your body
8g?!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Wait...! You're not thinking of blocking it with your body
8g?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: AHHHH!
records.m_Talk_DEU: AHHHH!
records.m_Talk_FRA: AHHHH!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That idiot...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That idiot...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That idiot...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch out! The building's about to fall!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch out! The building's about to fall!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch out! The building's about to fall!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How's the damage looking?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How's the damage looking?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How's the damage looking?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've transported everyone who needs treatment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've transported everyone who needs treatment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've transported everyone who needs treatment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Two houses have collapsed, and the people in there were injured, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Two houses have collapsed, and the people in there were injured, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Two houses have collapsed, and the people in there were injured, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: if the Helgon didn't throw herself to block it, it wouldn't have ended with just injuries.
records.m_Talk_DEU: if the Helgon didn't throw herself to block it, it wouldn't have ended with just injuries.
records.m_Talk_FRA: if the Helgon didn't throw herself to block it, it wouldn't have ended with just injuries.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm all right. I'm glad the others are safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm all right. I'm glad the others are safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm all right. I'm glad the others are safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! It hurts when you grab my injured arm like that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! It hurts when you grab my injured arm like that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! It hurts when you grab my injured arm like that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you out of your mind?! Why did you run head first to the monsters?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you out of your mind?! Why did you run head first to the monsters?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you out of your mind?! Why did you run head first to the monsters?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't it ever cross your mind that you might die?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't it ever cross your mind that you might die?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't it ever cross your mind that you might die?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... I thought I should do something because people were in danger...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... I thought I should do something because people were in danger...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... I thought I should do something because people were in danger...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But don't worry. This will heal in no time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But don't worry. This will heal in no time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But don't worry. This will heal in no time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't seem to figure you out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't seem to figure you out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't seem to figure you out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a rude outsider who thinks Merlin is a devil. But then, why are you risking your life for us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a rude outsider who thinks Merlin is a devil. But then, why are you risking your life for us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a rude outsider who thinks Merlin is a devil. But then, why are you risking your life for us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because... it's a Helgon's duty to protect the weak...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because... it's a Helgon's duty to protect the weak...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because... it's a Helgon's duty to protect the weak...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're so annoying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're so annoying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're so annoying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I anger her...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I anger her...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I anger her...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please excuse her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please excuse her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please excuse her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That child is terrified of anyone getting hurt in front of her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That child is terrified of anyone getting hurt in front of her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That child is terrified of anyone getting hurt in front of her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are some cases of the life support device having side effects.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are some cases of the life support device having side effects.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are some cases of the life support device having side effects.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But seeing how you are fighting well after receiving treatment, it appears you have none.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But seeing how you are fighting well after receiving treatment, it appears you have none.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But seeing how you are fighting well after receiving treatment, it appears you have none.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's you. You're the one who treated me. Merlin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's you. You're the one who treated me. Merlin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's you. You're the one who treated me. Merlin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did cutie already introduce me to you? How thoughtful of her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did cutie already introduce me to you? How thoughtful of her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did cutie already introduce me to you? How thoughtful of her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Care to have a drink?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Care to have a drink?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Care to have a drink?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But isn't that... alcohol?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But isn't that... alcohol?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But isn't that... alcohol?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Not your taste?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Not your taste?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Not your taste?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not that, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not that, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not that, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I lose consciousness if I even have a sip of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I lose consciousness if I even have a sip of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I lose consciousness if I even have a sip of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so? What a pity that you cannot drink something this stupendous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so? What a pity that you cannot drink something this stupendous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so? What a pity that you cannot drink something this stupendous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, how about some grapes? We just harvested some.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, how about some grapes? We just harvested some.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, how about some grapes? We just harvested some.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I like those. Thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I like those. Thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I like those. Thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it is all right with you, could I hear your story?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it is all right with you, could I hear your story?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it is all right with you, could I hear your story?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stories from across the gelid lands are hard to come by.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stories from across the gelid lands are hard to come by.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stories from across the gelid lands are hard to come by.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm from a place called Elysion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm from a place called Elysion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm from a place called Elysion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a country my ancestors built by erecting a tower to repel the plague.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a country my ancestors built by erecting a tower to repel the plague.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a country my ancestors built by erecting a tower to repel the plague.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A tower repelling the plague?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A tower repelling the plague?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A tower repelling the plague?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It's called the Solar Gate, and the Holy Relic of Avalon is stored there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It's called the Solar Gate, and the Holy Relic of Avalon is stored there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It's called the Solar Gate, and the Holy Relic of Avalon is stored there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Historians say the tower got its name because it is where the morning sun first rises.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Historians say the tower got its name because it is where the morning sun first rises.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Historians say the tower got its name because it is where the morning sun first rises.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solar Gate, you say...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solar Gate, you say...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solar Gate, you say...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a befitting name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a befitting name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a befitting name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what did you do over there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what did you do over there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what did you do over there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was a proud member of the pilgrimage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was a proud member of the pilgrimage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was a proud member of the pilgrimage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The pilgrimage's objective is to gather talented Helgons and defeat the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The pilgrimage's objective is to gather talented Helgons and defeat the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The pilgrimage's objective is to gather talented Helgons and defeat the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once the Demon Lord, the root of the plague, is gone, the world will be at peace again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once the Demon Lord, the root of the plague, is gone, the world will be at peace again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once the Demon Lord, the root of the plague, is gone, the world will be at peace again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rid of the Demon Lord and the plague will be no more...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rid of the Demon Lord and the plague will be no more...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rid of the Demon Lord and the plague will be no more...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds reasonable. The occurrence of the plague does coincide with the emergence of the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds reasonable. The occurrence of the plague does coincide with the emergence of the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds reasonable. The occurrence of the plague does coincide with the emergence of the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However... can the Demon Lord be defeated with just the powers of Helgons?
records.m_Talk_DEU: However... can the Demon Lord be defeated with just the powers of Helgons?
records.m_Talk_FRA: However... can the Demon Lord be defeated with just the powers of Helgons?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
That's
8v possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
That's
8v possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
That's
8v possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because we all believe it so.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because we all believe it so.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because we all believe it so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, our leader of the pilgrimage is the strongest in all of Elysion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, our leader of the pilgrimage is the strongest in all of Elysion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, our leader of the pilgrimage is the strongest in all of Elysion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that is what you believe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that is what you believe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that is what you believe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The possibilities that led to Elysion's foundation is... faith.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The possibilities that led to Elysion's foundation is... faith.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The possibilities that led to Elysion's foundation is... faith.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But faith didn't resolve all hardships.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But faith didn't resolve all hardships.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But faith didn't resolve all hardships.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a miracle that the Solar Gate fends off the plague... but it can't treat the ill like you have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a miracle that the Solar Gate fends off the plague... but it can't treat the ill like you have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a miracle that the Solar Gate fends off the plague... but it can't treat the ill like you have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I have a favor to ask you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I have a favor to ask you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I have a favor to ask you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I already know what you are about to ask.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I already know what you are about to ask.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I already know what you are about to ask.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, I cannot provide the assistance that you hope.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, I cannot provide the assistance that you hope.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, I cannot provide the assistance that you hope.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Countless lives are suffering from the plague in Elysion even this second!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Countless lives are suffering from the plague in Elysion even this second!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Countless lives are suffering from the plague in Elysion even this second!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you could treat them...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you could treat them...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you could treat them...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reason why I treated you is because I needed you alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reason why I treated you is because I needed you alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reason why I treated you is because I needed you alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My treatment must be worth the risk I am willing to take.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My treatment must be worth the risk I am willing to take.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My treatment must be worth the risk I am willing to take.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll pay whatever that is! There are many Helgons like me in Elysion...! I'm sure they'll be of help to you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll pay whatever that is! There are many Helgons like me in Elysion...! I'm sure they'll be of help to you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll pay whatever that is! There are many Helgons like me in Elysion...! I'm sure they'll be of help to you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is not the price I am referring to.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is not the price I am referring to.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is not the price I am referring to.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The treatment you speak of has its limits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The treatment you speak of has its limits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The treatment you speak of has its limits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Limits...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Limits...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Limits...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is a large stump at the center of our village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is a large stump at the center of our village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is a large stump at the center of our village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And huge possibilities pulsate from its roots.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And huge possibilities pulsate from its roots.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And huge possibilities pulsate from its roots.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reason I am standing in front of you, and why the people here are not affected by the plague... is all due to borrowing its power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reason I am standing in front of you, and why the people here are not affected by the plague... is all due to borrowing its power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reason I am standing in front of you, and why the people here are not affected by the plague... is all due to borrowing its power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I could give possibilities to all the world's patients out of goodwill. But then, the possibilities will deplete in mere seconds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I could give possibilities to all the world's patients out of goodwill. But then, the possibilities will deplete in mere seconds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I could give possibilities to all the world's patients out of goodwill. But then, the possibilities will deplete in mere seconds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is why I cannot help you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is why I cannot help you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is why I cannot help you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then the reason you call that a life support device...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then the reason you call that a life support device...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then the reason you call that a life support device...

records.m_Talk_ENG: is because this treatment is not orthodox.
records.m_Talk_DEU: is because this treatment is not orthodox.
records.m_Talk_FRA: is because this treatment is not orthodox.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are correct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are correct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are correct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you are not provided with the tree's constant possibilities, the plague will start spreading within you again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you are not provided with the tree's constant possibilities, the plague will start spreading within you again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you are not provided with the tree's constant possibilities, the plague will start spreading within you again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The plague will devour you as quickly as its effects have been delayed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The plague will devour you as quickly as its effects have been delayed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The plague will devour you as quickly as its effects have been delayed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then do the people of this village... know about all of this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then do the people of this village... know about all of this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then do the people of this village... know about all of this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, for I have never told them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, for I have never told them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, for I have never told them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am only telling you so because I do not want you to hate me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am only telling you so because I do not want you to hate me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am only telling you so because I do not want you to hate me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keep this between us, can you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keep this between us, can you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keep this between us, can you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did you help me when I'm not even one of your people?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did you help me when I'm not even one of your people?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did you help me when I'm not even one of your people?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I not say? I have use for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I not say? I have use for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I not say? I have use for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By saying you have use for me... are you talking about my Helgon powers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: By saying you have use for me... are you talking about my Helgon powers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: By saying you have use for me... are you talking about my Helgon powers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Partially.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Partially.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Partially.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Answer me this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Answer me this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Answer me this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it is something I can, gladly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it is something I can, gladly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it is something I can, gladly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is a tree with tremendous powers that can protect the people from the plague... in the middle of the gelid lands?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is a tree with tremendous powers that can protect the people from the plague... in the middle of the gelid lands?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is a tree with tremendous powers that can protect the people from the plague... in the middle of the gelid lands?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Stump has always been here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Stump has always been here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Stump has always been here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From the moment the world was born.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From the moment the world was born.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From the moment the world was born.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From when the world was born...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: From when the world was born...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: From when the world was born...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, that tree is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, that tree is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, that tree is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The World Tree.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The World Tree.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The World Tree.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you have learned your history, the term <color=#ffd34c>Golden Tree</color> of Avalon will be more familiar to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you have learned your history, the term <color=#ffd34c>Golden Tree</color> of Avalon will be more familiar to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you have learned your history, the term <color=#ffd34c>Golden Tree</color> of Avalon will be more familiar to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Tree?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Tree?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Tree?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that's impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that's impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that's impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard the reason my ancestors left Avalon and founded Elysion was because the Golden Tree of Avalon withered away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard the reason my ancestors left Avalon and founded Elysion was because the Golden Tree of Avalon withered away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the reason my ancestors left Avalon and founded Elysion was because the Golden Tree of Avalon withered away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you telling me that the history I learned was all a lie?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you telling me that the history I learned was all a lie?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you telling me that the history I learned was all a lie?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is true the Golden Tree withered due to the plague.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is true the Golden Tree withered due to the plague.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is true the Golden Tree withered due to the plague.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that were false, then the Golden Tree would not be looking like a stump.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that were false, then the Golden Tree would not be looking like a stump.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that were false, then the Golden Tree would not be looking like a stump.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What... happened here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What... happened here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What... happened here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: After the old kingdom of Avalon fell due to the plague, the seven fairies of the Golden Tree scattered across the lands with a duty to preserve humanity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After the old kingdom of Avalon fell due to the plague, the seven fairies of the Golden Tree scattered across the lands with a duty to preserve humanity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After the old kingdom of Avalon fell due to the plague, the seven fairies of the Golden Tree scattered across the lands with a duty to preserve humanity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some to the lakes and seas of life, others to the mountains blessed by the sun and moon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some to the lakes and seas of life, others to the mountains blessed by the sun and moon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some to the lakes and seas of life, others to the mountains blessed by the sun and moon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your hometown, Elysion, is a country one of the dispersed fairies had built.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your hometown, Elysion, is a country one of the dispersed fairies had built.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your hometown, Elysion, is a country one of the dispersed fairies had built.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A fairy... was involved in the foundation of Elysion?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A fairy... was involved in the foundation of Elysion?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A fairy... was involved in the foundation of Elysion?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I've never heard of such a thing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I've never heard of such a thing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I've never heard of such a thing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, you have not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, you have not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, you have not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because the fairies sacrificed their hearts to rid the plague from the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because the fairies sacrificed their hearts to rid the plague from the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because the fairies sacrificed their hearts to rid the plague from the gelid lands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A fairy that has lost its heart loses its status and is erased from the memory of all humans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A fairy that has lost its heart loses its status and is erased from the memory of all humans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A fairy that has lost its heart loses its status and is erased from the memory of all humans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A fairy's heart...? What's that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A fairy's heart...? What's that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A fairy's heart...? What's that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is the endless possibilities given by the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is the endless possibilities given by the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is the endless possibilities given by the Golden Tree.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here, we call it the <color=#ffd34c>Golden Branch</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here, we call it the <color=#ffd34c>Golden Branch</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here, we call it the <color=#ffd34c>Golden Branch</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Golden Branch...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Golden Branch...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Golden Branch...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard that name before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've heard that name before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've heard that name before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the Holy Relic and power source of the Solar Gate that fends off the plague.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the Holy Relic and power source of the Solar Gate that fends off the plague.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the Holy Relic and power source of the Solar Gate that fends off the plague.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never actually seen it, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never actually seen it, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never actually seen it, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is a Golden Branch within this stump that we protect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is a Golden Branch within this stump that we protect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is a Golden Branch within this stump that we protect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Tree, withered by the plague, is still alive thanks to the power of the Golden Branch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Tree, withered by the plague, is still alive thanks to the power of the Golden Branch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Tree, withered by the plague, is still alive thanks to the power of the Golden Branch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that is how this place was made.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that is how this place was made.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that is how this place was made.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the Stump.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the Stump.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the Stump.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're coming! It's a large monster this time!
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're coming! It's a large monster this time!
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're coming! It's a large monster this time!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's charging toward the residential area! The evacuated villagers are in there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's charging toward the residential area! The evacuated villagers are in there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's charging toward the residential area! The evacuated villagers are in there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! Why won't it stop even after I've already hit it this much?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! Why won't it stop even after I've already hit it this much?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! Why won't it stop even after I've already hit it this much?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll stop it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll stop it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll stop it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Wait...! You're not thinking of blocking it with your body
8g?!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Wait...! You're not thinking of blocking it with your body
8g?!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Wait...! You're not thinking of blocking it with your body
8g?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: AHHHH!
root.m_Talk_DEU: AHHHH!
root.m_Talk_FRA: AHHHH!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That idiot...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That idiot...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That idiot...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Watch out! The building's about to fall!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Watch out! The building's about to fall!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Watch out! The building's about to fall!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How's the damage looking?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How's the damage looking?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How's the damage looking?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've transported everyone who needs treatment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've transported everyone who needs treatment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've transported everyone who needs treatment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Two houses have collapsed, and the people in there were injured, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Two houses have collapsed, and the people in there were injured, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Two houses have collapsed, and the people in there were injured, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: if the Helgon didn't throw herself to block it, it wouldn't have ended with just injuries.
root.m_Talk_DEU: if the Helgon didn't throw herself to block it, it wouldn't have ended with just injuries.
root.m_Talk_FRA: if the Helgon didn't throw herself to block it, it wouldn't have ended with just injuries.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm all right. I'm glad the others are safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm all right. I'm glad the others are safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm all right. I'm glad the others are safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ouch!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ouch!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ouch!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! It hurts when you grab my injured arm like that!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! It hurts when you grab my injured arm like that!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! It hurts when you grab my injured arm like that!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you out of your mind?! Why did you run head first to the monsters?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you out of your mind?! Why did you run head first to the monsters?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you out of your mind?! Why did you run head first to the monsters?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't it ever cross your mind that you might die?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't it ever cross your mind that you might die?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't it ever cross your mind that you might die?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well... I thought I should do something because people were in danger...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well... I thought I should do something because people were in danger...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well... I thought I should do something because people were in danger...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But don't worry. This will heal in no time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But don't worry. This will heal in no time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But don't worry. This will heal in no time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't seem to figure you out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't seem to figure you out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't seem to figure you out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're a rude outsider who thinks Merlin is a devil. But then, why are you risking your life for us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're a rude outsider who thinks Merlin is a devil. But then, why are you risking your life for us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're a rude outsider who thinks Merlin is a devil. But then, why are you risking your life for us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because... it's a Helgon's duty to protect the weak...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's because... it's a Helgon's duty to protect the weak...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because... it's a Helgon's duty to protect the weak...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're so annoying.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're so annoying.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're so annoying.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did I anger her...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did I anger her...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did I anger her...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please excuse her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please excuse her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please excuse her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That child is terrified of anyone getting hurt in front of her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That child is terrified of anyone getting hurt in front of her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That child is terrified of anyone getting hurt in front of her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are some cases of the life support device having side effects.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are some cases of the life support device having side effects.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are some cases of the life support device having side effects.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But seeing how you are fighting well after receiving treatment, it appears you have none.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But seeing how you are fighting well after receiving treatment, it appears you have none.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But seeing how you are fighting well after receiving treatment, it appears you have none.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's you. You're the one who treated me. Merlin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's you. You're the one who treated me. Merlin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's you. You're the one who treated me. Merlin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did cutie already introduce me to you? How thoughtful of her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did cutie already introduce me to you? How thoughtful of her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did cutie already introduce me to you? How thoughtful of her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Care to have a drink?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Care to have a drink?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Care to have a drink?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But isn't that... alcohol?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But isn't that... alcohol?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But isn't that... alcohol?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Not your taste?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Not your taste?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Not your taste?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not that, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not that, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not that, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I lose consciousness if I even have a sip of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I lose consciousness if I even have a sip of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I lose consciousness if I even have a sip of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so? What a pity that you cannot drink something this stupendous.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so? What a pity that you cannot drink something this stupendous.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so? What a pity that you cannot drink something this stupendous.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, how about some grapes? We just harvested some.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, how about some grapes? We just harvested some.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, how about some grapes? We just harvested some.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I like those. Thank you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I like those. Thank you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I like those. Thank you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it is all right with you, could I hear your story?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it is all right with you, could I hear your story?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it is all right with you, could I hear your story?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stories from across the gelid lands are hard to come by.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stories from across the gelid lands are hard to come by.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stories from across the gelid lands are hard to come by.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm from a place called Elysion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm from a place called Elysion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm from a place called Elysion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a country my ancestors built by erecting a tower to repel the plague.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a country my ancestors built by erecting a tower to repel the plague.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a country my ancestors built by erecting a tower to repel the plague.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A tower repelling the plague?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A tower repelling the plague?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A tower repelling the plague?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It's called the Solar Gate, and the Holy Relic of Avalon is stored there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It's called the Solar Gate, and the Holy Relic of Avalon is stored there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It's called the Solar Gate, and the Holy Relic of Avalon is stored there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Historians say the tower got its name because it is where the morning sun first rises.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Historians say the tower got its name because it is where the morning sun first rises.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Historians say the tower got its name because it is where the morning sun first rises.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Solar Gate, you say...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Solar Gate, you say...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Solar Gate, you say...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a befitting name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a befitting name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a befitting name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And what did you do over there?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And what did you do over there?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And what did you do over there?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was a proud member of the pilgrimage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was a proud member of the pilgrimage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was a proud member of the pilgrimage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The pilgrimage's objective is to gather talented Helgons and defeat the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The pilgrimage's objective is to gather talented Helgons and defeat the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The pilgrimage's objective is to gather talented Helgons and defeat the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once the Demon Lord, the root of the plague, is gone, the world will be at peace again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once the Demon Lord, the root of the plague, is gone, the world will be at peace again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once the Demon Lord, the root of the plague, is gone, the world will be at peace again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rid of the Demon Lord and the plague will be no more...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rid of the Demon Lord and the plague will be no more...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rid of the Demon Lord and the plague will be no more...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds reasonable. The occurrence of the plague does coincide with the emergence of the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds reasonable. The occurrence of the plague does coincide with the emergence of the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds reasonable. The occurrence of the plague does coincide with the emergence of the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However... can the Demon Lord be defeated with just the powers of Helgons?
root.m_Talk_DEU: However... can the Demon Lord be defeated with just the powers of Helgons?
root.m_Talk_FRA: However... can the Demon Lord be defeated with just the powers of Helgons?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
That's
8v possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
That's
8v possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
That's
8v possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because we all believe it so.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because we all believe it so.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because we all believe it so.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, our leader of the pilgrimage is the strongest in all of Elysion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, our leader of the pilgrimage is the strongest in all of Elysion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, our leader of the pilgrimage is the strongest in all of Elysion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that is what you believe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that is what you believe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that is what you believe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The possibilities that led to Elysion's foundation is... faith.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The possibilities that led to Elysion's foundation is... faith.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The possibilities that led to Elysion's foundation is... faith.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But faith didn't resolve all hardships.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But faith didn't resolve all hardships.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But faith didn't resolve all hardships.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a miracle that the Solar Gate fends off the plague... but it can't treat the ill like you have.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a miracle that the Solar Gate fends off the plague... but it can't treat the ill like you have.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a miracle that the Solar Gate fends off the plague... but it can't treat the ill like you have.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, I have a favor to ask you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, I have a favor to ask you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, I have a favor to ask you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I already know what you are about to ask.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I already know what you are about to ask.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I already know what you are about to ask.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, I cannot provide the assistance that you hope.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, I cannot provide the assistance that you hope.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, I cannot provide the assistance that you hope.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Countless lives are suffering from the plague in Elysion even this second!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Countless lives are suffering from the plague in Elysion even this second!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Countless lives are suffering from the plague in Elysion even this second!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you could treat them...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you could treat them...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you could treat them...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The reason why I treated you is because I needed you alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The reason why I treated you is because I needed you alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The reason why I treated you is because I needed you alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My treatment must be worth the risk I am willing to take.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My treatment must be worth the risk I am willing to take.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My treatment must be worth the risk I am willing to take.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll pay whatever that is! There are many Helgons like me in Elysion...! I'm sure they'll be of help to you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll pay whatever that is! There are many Helgons like me in Elysion...! I'm sure they'll be of help to you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll pay whatever that is! There are many Helgons like me in Elysion...! I'm sure they'll be of help to you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is not the price I am referring to.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is not the price I am referring to.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is not the price I am referring to.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The treatment you speak of has its limits.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The treatment you speak of has its limits.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The treatment you speak of has its limits.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Limits...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Limits...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Limits...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is a large stump at the center of our village.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is a large stump at the center of our village.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is a large stump at the center of our village.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And huge possibilities pulsate from its roots.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And huge possibilities pulsate from its roots.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And huge possibilities pulsate from its roots.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The reason I am standing in front of you, and why the people here are not affected by the plague... is all due to borrowing its power.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The reason I am standing in front of you, and why the people here are not affected by the plague... is all due to borrowing its power.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The reason I am standing in front of you, and why the people here are not affected by the plague... is all due to borrowing its power.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I could give possibilities to all the world's patients out of goodwill. But then, the possibilities will deplete in mere seconds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I could give possibilities to all the world's patients out of goodwill. But then, the possibilities will deplete in mere seconds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I could give possibilities to all the world's patients out of goodwill. But then, the possibilities will deplete in mere seconds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is why I cannot help you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is why I cannot help you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is why I cannot help you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then the reason you call that a life support device...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then the reason you call that a life support device...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then the reason you call that a life support device...

root.m_Talk_ENG: is because this treatment is not orthodox.
root.m_Talk_DEU: is because this treatment is not orthodox.
root.m_Talk_FRA: is because this treatment is not orthodox.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are correct.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are correct.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are correct.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you are not provided with the tree's constant possibilities, the plague will start spreading within you again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you are not provided with the tree's constant possibilities, the plague will start spreading within you again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you are not provided with the tree's constant possibilities, the plague will start spreading within you again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The plague will devour you as quickly as its effects have been delayed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The plague will devour you as quickly as its effects have been delayed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The plague will devour you as quickly as its effects have been delayed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then do the people of this village... know about all of this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then do the people of this village... know about all of this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then do the people of this village... know about all of this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, for I have never told them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, for I have never told them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, for I have never told them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am only telling you so because I do not want you to hate me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am only telling you so because I do not want you to hate me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am only telling you so because I do not want you to hate me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Keep this between us, can you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Keep this between us, can you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Keep this between us, can you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why did you help me when I'm not even one of your people?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why did you help me when I'm not even one of your people?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why did you help me when I'm not even one of your people?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did I not say? I have use for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did I not say? I have use for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did I not say? I have use for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: By saying you have use for me... are you talking about my Helgon powers?
root.m_Talk_DEU: By saying you have use for me... are you talking about my Helgon powers?
root.m_Talk_FRA: By saying you have use for me... are you talking about my Helgon powers?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Partially.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Partially.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Partially.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Answer me this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Answer me this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Answer me this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it is something I can, gladly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it is something I can, gladly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it is something I can, gladly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why is a tree with tremendous powers that can protect the people from the plague... in the middle of the gelid lands?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why is a tree with tremendous powers that can protect the people from the plague... in the middle of the gelid lands?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why is a tree with tremendous powers that can protect the people from the plague... in the middle of the gelid lands?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Stump has always been here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Stump has always been here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Stump has always been here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From the moment the world was born.
root.m_Talk_DEU: From the moment the world was born.
root.m_Talk_FRA: From the moment the world was born.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From when the world was born...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: From when the world was born...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: From when the world was born...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, that tree is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, that tree is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, that tree is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The World Tree.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The World Tree.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The World Tree.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you have learned your history, the term <color=#ffd34c>Golden Tree</color> of Avalon will be more familiar to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you have learned your history, the term <color=#ffd34c>Golden Tree</color> of Avalon will be more familiar to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you have learned your history, the term <color=#ffd34c>Golden Tree</color> of Avalon will be more familiar to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Tree?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Tree?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Tree?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that's impossible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that's impossible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that's impossible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard the reason my ancestors left Avalon and founded Elysion was because the Golden Tree of Avalon withered away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard the reason my ancestors left Avalon and founded Elysion was because the Golden Tree of Avalon withered away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the reason my ancestors left Avalon and founded Elysion was because the Golden Tree of Avalon withered away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you telling me that the history I learned was all a lie?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you telling me that the history I learned was all a lie?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you telling me that the history I learned was all a lie?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is true the Golden Tree withered due to the plague.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is true the Golden Tree withered due to the plague.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is true the Golden Tree withered due to the plague.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that were false, then the Golden Tree would not be looking like a stump.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that were false, then the Golden Tree would not be looking like a stump.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that were false, then the Golden Tree would not be looking like a stump.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What... happened here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What... happened here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What... happened here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: After the old kingdom of Avalon fell due to the plague, the seven fairies of the Golden Tree scattered across the lands with a duty to preserve humanity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: After the old kingdom of Avalon fell due to the plague, the seven fairies of the Golden Tree scattered across the lands with a duty to preserve humanity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After the old kingdom of Avalon fell due to the plague, the seven fairies of the Golden Tree scattered across the lands with a duty to preserve humanity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Some to the lakes and seas of life, others to the mountains blessed by the sun and moon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Some to the lakes and seas of life, others to the mountains blessed by the sun and moon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Some to the lakes and seas of life, others to the mountains blessed by the sun and moon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your hometown, Elysion, is a country one of the dispersed fairies had built.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your hometown, Elysion, is a country one of the dispersed fairies had built.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your hometown, Elysion, is a country one of the dispersed fairies had built.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A fairy... was involved in the foundation of Elysion?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A fairy... was involved in the foundation of Elysion?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A fairy... was involved in the foundation of Elysion?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I've never heard of such a thing!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I've never heard of such a thing!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I've never heard of such a thing!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, you have not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, you have not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, you have not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because the fairies sacrificed their hearts to rid the plague from the gelid lands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because the fairies sacrificed their hearts to rid the plague from the gelid lands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because the fairies sacrificed their hearts to rid the plague from the gelid lands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A fairy that has lost its heart loses its status and is erased from the memory of all humans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A fairy that has lost its heart loses its status and is erased from the memory of all humans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A fairy that has lost its heart loses its status and is erased from the memory of all humans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A fairy's heart...? What's that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A fairy's heart...? What's that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A fairy's heart...? What's that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is the endless possibilities given by the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is the endless possibilities given by the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is the endless possibilities given by the Golden Tree.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Here, we call it the <color=#ffd34c>Golden Branch</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Here, we call it the <color=#ffd34c>Golden Branch</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Here, we call it the <color=#ffd34c>Golden Branch</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Golden Branch...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Golden Branch...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Golden Branch...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard that name before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've heard that name before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've heard that name before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the Holy Relic and power source of the Solar Gate that fends off the plague.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the Holy Relic and power source of the Solar Gate that fends off the plague.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the Holy Relic and power source of the Solar Gate that fends off the plague.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never actually seen it, though.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never actually seen it, though.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never actually seen it, though.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is a Golden Branch within this stump that we protect.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is a Golden Branch within this stump that we protect.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is a Golden Branch within this stump that we protect.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Tree, withered by the plague, is still alive thanks to the power of the Golden Branch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Tree, withered by the plague, is still alive thanks to the power of the Golden Branch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Tree, withered by the plague, is still alive thanks to the power of the Golden Branch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that is how this place was made.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that is how this place was made.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that is how this place was made.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the Stump.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the Stump.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the Stump.
